title: ferray-random: no out= parameter — every generation allocates
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's Generator.random(size, out=buffer), standard_normal(size, out=buffer), standard_exponential(size, out=buffer) accept a pre-allocated output array. ferray-random always allocates a new Vec and wraps it in a new Array. For hot loops that generate many batches of the same size, this causes allocation pressure. Add out= or _into variants for the core generators.
